data/maps/MossdeepCity_Mart/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Mart_Text_ReviveIsFantastic: REVIVE is fantastic!\pGive it to a fainted POKéMON, and the\nPOKéMON will arise.\pBut be careful, REVIVE doesn't restore\nthe used-up PP of moves.
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Mart/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Mart_Text_MaxRepelLastsLong: MAX REPEL keeps all weak POKéMON away.\pOut of all the REPEL sprays, it lasts\nthe longest.
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Mart/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Mart_Text_NetAndDiveBallsRa:
The NET and DIVE BALLS are rare POKé
BALLS that are only made in MOSSDEEP.\pA NET BALL is effective against
BUG-type and WATER-type POKéMON.\pA DIVE BALL works best on POKéMON at
the bottom of the sea.
